Bus Timings

27 Bus Schedule The Dubai Mall to Gold Souq Bus Station

June 10, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai Bus 27 offers a convenient public transport option connecting key landmarks and residential areas between The Dubai Mall and Gold Souq Bus Station. This route serves commuters with frequent stops at major attractions and business hubs across Dubai.

Bus Timings

The 27 bus at The Dubai Mall departs daily with a reliable schedule from early morning until late evening. This service offers convenient transportation options for commuters throughout the day, with timings scheduled at regular intervals to accommodate varied travel needs.

From The Dubai Mall From Gold Souq
06:30 05:30
07:00 06:00
07:30 06:30
07:50 07:00
08:10 07:20
08:32 07:40
08:54 08:00
09:18 08:25
09:43 08:55
10:12 09:21
10:33 09:50
10:58 10:18
11:25 10:43
11:52 11:05
12:17 11:30
12:44 11:55
13:09 12:20
13:39 12:42
14:00 13:05

15:50 15:00

16:53 15:55

17:53 16:45

19:20 18:35

20:35 19:55

22:55 22:05
23:20 22:35
23:45 23:10
00:20  

Download PDF Bus 27

Bus 27 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can head to the official RTA website, or simply follow this link for the 27 Bus Timings.

Bus Route

The Bus 27 route includes stops at the following locations:

  1. The Dubai Mall

  2. The Palace Hotel

  3. Collapse

  4. Etisalat

  5. Emirates Tower Metro Landside

  6. Emirates Tower

  7. Emirates Tower, 2

  8. World Trade Centre Hotel

  9. Max Metro Landside

  10. Department of Health

  11. Umm Hurair, Road

  12. Umm Hurair, Road, 2

  13. City Centre Metro · 2

  14. DNATA

  15. Clock Tower Roundabout

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Maktoum Road

  2. Etisalat Head Office

  3. Union Metro · 1

  4. Al Nakhal

  5. Burj Nahar, Intersection

  6. Naif, Intersection

  7. Eyal Nasir Masjid

  8. Gold Souq Bus Station · 12

Intersection of Bus Routes at Burj Nahar Intersection

This central location offers seamless connections between these diverse routes, making it a crucial point for passengers traveling throughout Dubai. The stop is well-equipped with essential amenities and real-time schedule updates, providing a convenient and efficient travel experience for commuters using these intersecting bus services.

Also See: Complete Guide to Dubai Bus 24: Route and Stops

Bus Ticket Price

The exact fare for Dubai’s 27 bus route depends on the number of zones you travel through, but you can expect it to be around AED 5. This estimation is based on typical Dubai bus fares and the short distance covered by route 27. To get the most accurate price for your trip, use the Dubai Roads and Transport Authority’s (RTA) journey planner.

Bus Booking

Passengers can avail themselves of bus services directly at designated stops without prior booking. For more information on schedules, fares, and route details, passengers can visit the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) website or contact customer service for assistance.

Journey Experience

Taking bus route 27 from The Dubai Mall to Gold Souq Bus Station is a great way to explore Dubai. You start at The Dubai Mall, a massive shopping center with stunning views of the Burj Khalifa and the Dubai Fountain.

Overall, this trip offers a convenient and scenic route through the heart of Dubai.

Read More: Everything You Need to Know About Abu Dhabi Bus 102: Route and Stops

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, travelers can easily reach Gold Souq Bus Station · 12, the final stop on the Dubai Bus 27 route starting from The Dubai Mall. This route offers a convenient and affordable way to navigate through Dubai’s bustling cityscape. The fare ranges from AED 53 to 64, making it an economical choice for both residents and visitors looking to explore the city’s diverse landmarks and cultural sites. Careem provides a seamless booking experience, ensuring passengers can plan their journey with ease and reliability.

Dubai Bus 27 serves as a crucial link in Dubai’s public transport network, providing efficient connectivity across major landmarks and residential areas. Whether commuting for work or leisure, this route ensures a seamless travel experience with reliable services and affordable fares.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: June 10, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
